'''Garlan Limoth''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] who represented the [[Trans-Nebular sector/Legends|Trans-Nebular sector]] from at least [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]] until his death in a tragic accident in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]. He was believed to have been assassinated when he withdrew his support of [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] shortly after the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]] was instituted.

{{Char-stub}}
